package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for transport_layer_uses_untyped_string_codes_without_catalog: Response code strings that have no shared type or catalog package.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule210NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule210NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule210NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario210Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule210NegativeService, input Rule210NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
